landing.headline: The groundwork for serious multi-tenant apps — already built.
landing.subhead: A reusable, production-minded foundation: the identity, access, real-time and internationalization plumbing most business apps need — engineered once, cloned per project.

whatIs.title: What this is
whatIs.lead: A foundation, not a finished product.
points: A reusable starting point for generic, multi-tenant business websites — the infrastructure most apps need, built once and cloned per project.
Organizations, users, roles and permissions out of the box, so every new project begins with identity and access already solved.
Real-time messaging, full internationalization (English + Hebrew, right-to-left) and light/dark theming, included.
Opinionated where it matters — security, types, structure — and flexible everywhere you build your actual product.

architecture.title: Architecture & where data lives
points: A TypeScript monorepo (Turborepo + pnpm) of small, single-responsibility packages shared across apps.
Data lives in a managed PostgreSQL database in the cloud (Supabase) — not on any one machine.
Built to deploy on Vercel, configured per project entirely through environment variables.

security.title: Security, engineered in
points: Tenant isolation is enforced in the database itself — one organization can never see another's data, even if application code has a bug.
Every privileged action is re-checked on the server; a hidden button is never treated as the security boundary.
Secrets live only in environment variables — never in source code, never shipped to the browser.
High-privilege keys are used strictly server-side; the browser only ever holds a low-privilege, restricted key.
Error logging redacts secrets automatically, so passwords, tokens and keys never reach the logs.

why.title: Why the foundation matters
why.lead: Get the hard parts right first.
points: Identity, tenancy, roles and security are the hardest things to retrofit — doing them first makes everything after safer.
New features — calendar, tasks, billing and beyond — inherit isolation and permissions for free.
One audited foundation, many products: improve it once, and every project benefits.
Less boilerplate per project means more time on what makes each product unique.

demo.title: Demo access
demo.subtitle: Sign in with any seeded account and explore the platform exactly as an operator would.
demo.ownerNote: Creates organizations and onboards their first admin.
demo.note: Demo accounts — for evaluation only. This section is removed before real production.

landing.footer: A foundation for building — not a finished product.
